statement: In every magma, Equation 2955 (`x = ((y * (y * y)) * z) * w`) implies Equation 2432 (`x = (y * (z * (w * w))) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0319
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op y y)) z) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op w w))) z)
